title: The Realists
content:
Hope that you may understand!
    What can books of men that wive
    In a dragon-guarded land,
    Paintings of the dolphin-drawn
    Sea-nymphs in their pearly waggons
    Do, but awake a hope to live
    That had gone
    With the dragons?
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Realists"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
